title: Beyond CM chair tussle: What could make or break DKS's reign in Karnataka
content: DK Shivakumar takes the helm as Karnataka's new Chief Minister, facing a daunting array of challenges beyond his renowned firefighting skills. He must navigate complex factional tensions, manage caste expectations, address fiscal pressures, and prove his governance capabilities. The success of his tenure hinges on balancing these demands and establishing his authority.

title: India-US deal: $140bn trade ties moves closer to new framework agreement
content: India and the US have finalized most of the legal text for their bilateral trade agreement, with negotiations now focusing on minor details. The treaty's finalization hinges on clarity regarding the US tariff mechanism post-next month, as India seeks to maintain export advantages.

title: Trump says Iran talks continue 'at rapid pace' as Tehran suspends negotiations after Lebanon strikes
content: US President Donald Trump stated that negotiations with Iran are progressing rapidly despite recent exchanges of fire testing a fragile ceasefire. He also announced a halt to attacks between Hezbollah and Israel following calls with Prime Minister Netanyahu and Hezbollah representatives. Iran, however, indicated it has ceased communication with Washington through mediators due to the escalation in Lebanon.

title: Google plans to release 32 million Wolbachia-infected mosquitoes across Florida and California
content: Alphabet's Debug initiative is seeking EPA approval to release 32 million specially treated male mosquitoes in California and Florida. This innovative approach uses Wolbachia bacteria to sterilize wild Culex mosquitoes, aiming to significantly reduce the spread of diseases like West Nile virus. Advanced AI and robotics are enabling this large-scale effort, with trials planned over two years.

title: With 5 judge appointments, SC's strength increases to 37
content: The Law Ministry has appointed five new judges to the Supreme Court. This brings the total strength of the apex court to 37, including the Chief Justice of India. The new judges will take their oath on Tuesday. This appointment fills most of the vacancies after the sanctioned strength was recently increased. The Supreme Court now has one vacancy remaining.

title: Wangchuk says key points omitted from Ladakh talks draft, warns of hunger strike
content: Fresh disagreements have emerged regarding Ladakh's political future. The Leh Apex Body claims the Centre omitted crucial details from a draft record of recent talks. They are demanding corrections and warning of renewed protests, including hunger strikes. The Ladakh chief secretary stated the summary document was shared in good faith and invited objections.

title: Venezuela acting president may visit India next week
content: Venezuela's acting President, Delcy Rodriguez, is poised for a New Delhi visit this week, signaling a deepening energy partnership. This comes as India actively seeks to diversify its oil sources, with Washington encouraging increased purchases from the South American nation.  Venezuela has recently emerged as a significant crude supplier for India.

title: 'Amazon would collapse if run like New York City': Jeff Bezos takes swipe at Mamdani
content: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has endorsed New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's new government efficiency initiative, COGE. This comes after their public disagreement on taxing the wealthy. Bezos, who previously criticized city spending, now supports Mamdani's plan to make government work smarter, suggesting savings could benefit lower earners.

title: Right to be forgotten: HC lets personal info be masked in judicial records
content: Delhi High Court has recognized the 'right to be forgotten' as integral to the right to privacy, stating individuals shouldn't suffer reputational harm due to persistent digital information. Search engines like Google must de-index private or favorably concluded judicial records, protecting dignity over indefinite digital presence.

title: Casual labourers in government entitled to pension: SC
content: The Supreme Court has ruled that temporary casual laborers in government departments are entitled to pensionary benefits upon superannuation, even without job regularization. This landmark decision came after an 18-year legal battle by a widow whose husband served for three decades.

title: Google AI CEO has a message for laid off engineers at Meta, Amazon, Block, and other companies
content: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis argues companies cutting engineers due to AI are misguided. He believes increased productivity should fuel more projects, not layoffs. Hassabis sees AI as an opportunity to expand ambitions, not shrink workforces, and is eager to hire talent shed by rivals for new ventures like drug discovery and game design.

title: Government cuts Kharif fertiliser demand estimate on weak monsoon outlook
content: India anticipates reduced fertilizer use this Kharif season. This comes as the monsoon forecast suggests below-normal rainfall. Urea demand is now projected at 190 lakh tonnes, down from 194 lakh tonnes. Diammonium Phosphate demand is also lowered to 60 lakh tonnes. Government assures ample stocks of rice, wheat, and pulses for domestic needs.

title: From split to stitch-up? Shiva Sena factions hint at reunion amid BJP's dominance
content: Shiv Sena factions, split four years ago, are now considering reunification due to the BJP's increasing dominance in Maharashtra. Leaders from both Uddhav Thackeray and Eknath Shinde's camps believe the BJP poses an existential threat, weakening regional allies.  Calls for unity are growing, with suggestions that a reunion could happen swiftly if Shinde agrees.

title: 49ers investor Vinod Khosla eyes blockbuster bid for Seahawks
content: Tech billionaire Vinod Khosla is reportedly preparing a blockbuster bid to acquire the Seattle Seahawks. This move could see him give up on his minority stake in the San Francisco 49ers. The Seahawks are valued at over $10 billion. It places Khosla among other prominent investors vying for the NFL franchise, others being Aditya Mittal and Wyc Grousbeck. The sale process is reportedly progressing rapidly according to an NFL insider, and a deal could happen in August.

title: Giants reunite with Odell Beckham Jr in surprise offseason move
content: Odell Beckham Jr. has officially reunited with the New York Giants after five years away from the team. The veteran wide receiver signed with New York following a successful workout on Monday. Beckham missed the entire 2025 NFL season but now gets another opportunity with the franchise where he became an NFL superstar and created some of football’s most unforgettable moments.

title: Declan Rice’s girlfriend: All about Lauren Fryer before 2026 World Cup
content: Arsenal star midfielder Declan Rice has been with his girlfriend, Lauren Fryer, for over a decade now even as the two have continued to get trolled for their relationship in public for the last few years. While Lauren Fryer has remained pretty private about her life, Declan Rice has often defended her in public as he spoke about how she has changed his life for the better.

title: UK tribunal orders truant employer to pay Kerala man Rs 38.4L for not giving a day's work
content: A Kerala man, Shabin Shaji, was awarded £30,000 by a UK tribunal after a care agency brought him to Britain on a healthcare visa but failed to provide any work or pay.  Shaji, who spent £17,000 to secure the visa, faced extreme hardship, relying on charity for survival. The agency's sponsorship license has since been revoked.

title: J&K to set up rehabilitation centres for drug addicts
content: Jammu and Kashmir is set to establish government-run rehabilitation centers statewide to aid recovering addicts. Lieutenant Governor Manoj Sinha highlighted the campaign's success in disrupting drug trafficking, leading to increased public reporting and treatment-seeking. Over 900 FIRs and over 1,000 arrests have been made, targeting the financial roots of terrorism.

title: Horoscope: Astrological predictions for June 2
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for June 2, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: Keeping India's growth story intact: 5 lessons from Middle East conflict that should not be ignored
content: Short-term global economic shocks, like the ongoing Middle East conflict, have the potential to temporarily slow the growth story - a fact that cannot be ignored if India hopes to be among the top three world economies in the coming years.

title: 'Kohli is a huge name in Australia right now': Deputy PM after RCB's title
content: Australia's Deputy Prime Minister Richard Marles praised RCB's IPL 2026 title win as a symbol of the strong India-Australia partnership. Highlighting the contributions of Virat Kohli, Josh Hazlewood and Tim David, Marles said their combined success reflected growing cooperation between the two nations. He also noted Kohli's popularity in Australia and described meeting Kapil Dev as a special fan moment.

title: 'AC-on, AC-off' mileage tests mandatory for new cars from next April
content: Starting next April, carmakers must test new vehicle mileage with and without air conditioning, a move by the government to offer consumers more realistic fuel efficiency figures. This transparency aims to empower buyers' decisions. Existing models will receive an extended compliance period. The new norms apply to both petrol, diesel, and electric vehicles, reflecting India's distinct driving conditions.

title: UP woman dies after quack performs C-section at sealed hospital
content: A 30-year-old ASHA worker died in Sonbhadra after a quack allegedly performed a C-section at a hospital that had been sealed multiple times. The accused and associates fled after the botched surgery, leaving the woman's abdomen unsutured. The newborn survived. Authorities have launched a manhunt for the hospital operators, Naseem and Salma, who are now facing serious charges.

title: 'Will most likely be arrested at the airport': CJP founder on return to India
content: Cockroach Janta Party founder Abhijeet Dipke anticipates arrest upon returning to India, despite his satirical movement gaining significant traction. He remains committed to a peaceful protest demanding the education minister's resignation over examination system failures, aiming to reshape political discourse for youth concerns.

title: Kangana Ranaut recalls heartbreak over parents’ reaction to ‘Gangster’
content: Actor-politician Kangana Ranaut has revealed that her parents were far from impressed after watching her breakthrough film Gangster, admitting that their reaction left her deeply hurt. The actress, who is currently promoting her upcoming film Bharat Bhhagya Viddhaata, shared that it was only after she received a National Award that her family began to appreciate her achievements.

title: 'Serious differences with leadership': Annamalai to quit BJP, launch new party - Exclusive
content: Sources indicate former Tamil Nadu BJP president K Annamalai is set to quit the party, with a meeting with top BJP leaders in Delhi expected to precede an announcement. This development follows mounting speculation about his political future, fueled by supporter posters and his own cryptic remarks.

title: Raiders linked to Bills WR Keon Coleman in proposed trade swap
content: The Las Vegas Raiders have been linked to Buffalo Bills wide receiver Keon Coleman in a proposed trade scenario from ESPN. The suggested deal would send a 2028 fifth-round pick to Buffalo in exchange for Coleman and a seventh-round selection. While Bills insiders believe Buffalo is likely to keep the former second-round pick, the Raiders could view him as an affordable option to strengthen their receiving corps around rookie quarterback Fernando Mendoza.

title: Williams, 44, set to return 4 years after playing her last competitive match
content: Serena Williams will return to competitive tennis for the first time since the 2022 US Open after accepting a wild card for the women's doubles event at Queen's Club. The 23-time Grand Slam champion, 44, is expected to partner Victoria Mboko. Williams fuelled excitement with a social media teaser, while her comeback follows her re-entry into tennis' anti-doping programme last year.

title: 'Critical anchor': US Secretary of War Hegseth praises India, pitches Javelin anti-tank missile
content: US Secretary of War Pete Hegseth lauded India as a vital partner in the Indo-Pacific, emphasizing its role in maintaining regional power balance. He also revealed plans for co-producing Javelin anti-tank missiles in India, a move aimed at bolstering collective defense capabilities and addressing US supply shortages. This collaboration signifies deepening interoperability and industrial cooperation between the two nations.

title: UP ATS arrests man linked to Pakistan-backed terror network
content: Uttar Pradesh ATS apprehended a 22-year-old for allegedly working with a Pakistan-backed terror network. The group groomed Indian youth via social media, assigning missions including targeting BJP leaders. Recovered items include a pistol and cartridges. The accused was reportedly handled by Pakistan-based operatives, with a "trial mission" involving assassination plans.

title: PM Modi raises border security, refugee concerns with Myanmar prez
content: Prime Minister Modi voiced concerns to Myanmar's President over armed group activities near the India border and the conflict's impact on Indian communities. He urged Myanmar to prevent harm to Indian civilians during military operations and discussed the repatriation of refugees. Connectivity projects and cyber scam victims were also addressed.

title: Vashu Bhagnani recalls gifting cars after ‘Coolie No 1’ success
content: Veteran producer Vashu Bhagnani breaks his silence on industry relationships, particularly his long-standing bond with David Dhawan and a strained equation with Ramesh Taurani.  Bhagnani highlights past hurts and broken trust, especially concerning music rights for films like 'Coolie No. 1' and upcoming projects, emphasizing fair revenue sharing with creative contributors.

title: Making of a powerhouse: With Kohli & Bhuvi at heart, how RCB conquered IPL 2026
content: RCB completed a remarkable transformation by winning back-to-back IPL titles, defeating Gujarat Titans in the 2026 final after years of heartbreak. Rajat Patidar's side dominated the season with 11 wins, powered by a balanced squad rather than relying solely on Virat Kohli. Kohli led the batting with 675 runs, while Patidar, Devdutt Padikkal, Tim David and Krunal Pandya provided strong support.

title: MiraOne founder explains why one-size-fits-all healthcare is fading
content: MiraOne offers a comprehensive blood test combining genetic insights and medicine-response analysis for personalized wellness. Founded by Nickhil Jakatdar and Abhinav Kejriwal, it translates complex data into actionable recommendations, addressing the healthcare challenge of truly personalized medicine. This innovative approach empowers individuals to make informed health decisions and enhances the doctor-patient relationship

title: From Agni 5 to Akash & hypersonics: Decoding India's homegrown arsenal & defence shield
content: India is rapidly advancing its indigenous defence capabilities, moving from import dependence to becoming a global player.  From long-range missiles and nuclear submarines to anti-drone systems and hypersonic technology, the nation is building a resilient arsenal.  This strategic shift enhances national security and positions India as a key partner in defence innovation and production.

title: How to verify if a housing project is RERA-registered — Why it's important
content: Before buying property, verify RERA registration to safeguard your investment. Unregistered projects offer fewer protections against builder fraud, misleading information, and project delays. Checking the Unified RERA portal or state RERA website using project details ensures transparency and legal recourse, providing vital project information and developer history.

title: Court allows CBI to arrest former Reliance ADAG executive Jhunjhunwala in bank fraud case
content: After hearing arguments from both sides, the Mumbai court allowed the CBI's application to formally arrest the accused as per provisions of law.

title: The silken voice of Hindi cinema falls silent
content: From vibrant chartbusters to melancholic ghazals, the versatile singer ruled hearts without chasing the spotlight

title: Man dies after alleged custodial torture in Odisha; three police personnel suspended
content: The BJD alleged that nine custodial deaths were reported in the past year matching the total number recorded over the preceding four years

title: Breakaway faction of banned Jamaat rallies behind J&K L-G Manoj Sinha’s anti-drug campaign in volatile Kulgam
content: “When we choke off drug smuggling, we weaken those who seek to destabilise our nation, spill the blood of innocent people, and divert our youth from the path of progress,” says the Lieutenant Governor

title: Cockroach Janta Party now transitioning into a movement: Abhijeet Dipke
content: Mr. Dipke said he would return to India on June 6 and seek permission for a protest at Jantar Mantar, the CJP’s first major planned public mobilisation

title: Meghalaya and Nagaland CMs call for release of 20 hostages
content: Conrad Sangma writes to apex social bodies of Nagas and Kukis of Manipur for immediate release of all hostages; Neiphiu Rio seeks Home Minister’s intervention for release of 6 Liangmai Nagas

title: Chief Minister Vijay promises inclusive and corruption-free government
content: The TVK government will never compromise on secularism, State rights, sharing of river water, or social justice, he says at a public meeting organised to thank the voters of Tiruchi East, from where he was elected to the Assembly, besides Perambur in Chennai

title: Overloading, violation of SOPs have made Kashmir’s Gondola cable car vulnerable to technical snags
content: Set up in 1998, Gondola has two phases of rides: one from Gulmarg to Kongdoori (10 minutes ride) and another from Kongdoori to Apharwat (12 minutes ride), with the highest point located at an altitude of 4,390 metres (14,403 feet).

title: Gram Sabha consent fabricated to divert forest for mining bauxite, say villagers in Odisha’s Koraput
content: Villagers from Balda and Banur villages allege that Kalinga Alumina Limited, an Adani subsidiary, the panchayat, and district officials colluded to forge the signatures of dead, injured, and absent people on resolutions that consented to the mining

title: RJD questions allotment of Patna bungalows to six NDA MPs
content: Opposition alleges BJP-led NDA government in Bihar is not complying with guidelines previously laid down by Patna High Court regarding house allotment

title: Karnataka mango produce falls by 5 lakh tonnes this year due to climate extremities
content: Due to late mango harvest and low yield, the state level mango mela organised in Lalbagh has delayed by a month

title: Committee to examine government school standards in Kerala: Minister
content: Minister for General Education V. Samsudheen denies there is any going back on the announcement of menstrual leave for schoolgirls, calls for focussing on the positives of the proposal

title: Industries, colleges must pay dues to Gram Panchayats: Pawan Kalyan
content: Empowered committee to examine tax compliance as Deputy Chief Minister flags widespread undervaluation of properties and ₹160-crore arrears owed to local bodies

title: Priya Ravichandran assumes office as Collector of Ranipet
content: The officer is also the recipient of the President’s Award for Gallantry, the President’s Police Medal for Meritorious Service, and the Anna Medal for Bravery

title: Twisha Sharma death case: CBI recreates crime scene using dummies
content: CBI’s investigation intensifies as alleged dowry harassment case draws public outcry and demands for justice following the tragic death of 33-year-old Twisha Sharma

title: IIP growth slows to 4.9% as new data shows dip in mining activity
content: The IIP series, which till now had 2011-12 as its base year, has now been updated to 2022-23; the new basket of goods to calculate IIP consists of 1,042 products mapped to 463 item groups; within the manufacturing sector, which constitutes about 75% of the IIP basket of goods, six industries contracted

title: Myanmar not to allow use of its territory by anti-India elements: President Min Aung Hlaing
content: India to train Myanmar military for UN peacekeeping; discussions between the two countries include the issue of continued detention of former leader and Nobel laureate Aung San Suu Kyi as well as infrastructure projects such as the Kaladan Multimodal Transit Transport Project and the trilateral Moreh-Mae Tsot highway to connect India’s northeast with Myanmar via Thailand

title: Watch: CM Vijay’s full speech in Trichy: Why shouldn’t I wear a coat suit?
content: Tamil Nadu’s new Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay returned to the field today to thank voters for bringing his party, the TVK, to power in its first ever election

title: Centre signs agreement with ISRO, rolls out new water research initiatives
content: Under the MoU, the department of water resources and the Indian Space Research Organisation (ISRO) will jointly work in 24 key research areas

title: India moves ahead on Rafale deal, IAF chief holds talks in France
content: France is expected to respond within the next two-three months, and negotiations are likely to conclude within a year in the deal estimated to be worth ₹3.25 lakh crore

title: ED attaches properties worth ₹1,000 crore in Chhattisgarh liquor scam case
content: Attachments include Goa hotel bought using money physically transported allegedly at the instance of ex-CM Bhupesh Baghel’s son, claims agency

title: Doctors’ body barred from Parliamentary panel meeting on NEET after BJP objections
content: UDF representatives, listed as witnesses, stopped from deposing before panel reviewing National Testing Agency amid row over neutrality

title: Maharashtra FDA seizes methanol from Bhiwandi firm after Pune liquor deaths
content: The chemical was supplied to bootleggers who allegedly made the liquor that killed 16 people in Pune and Pimpri-Chinchwad

title: Students are paying the price of mistakes made by CBSE: Congress
content: Rahul Gandhi’s X post says, “The mistake belongs to the CBSE. The punishment falls on the student. The profit goes to the government.”

title: HC orders inquiry into amassing of ₹800 crore of Chettinad family money by educationist Meena Muthiah’s employee
content: Justice Mohammed Shaffiq directs Greater Chennai Commissioner of Police to take appropriate action on the complaint lodged against Karuppan Chetty by V. Palaniappan

title: No scope for manipulation in DSC-2025 recruitment, says Naidu
content: Chief Minister rejects YSRCP allegations of paper leaks and irregularities; says question selection was fully automated and recruitment process remained transparent

title: Centre backtracking on draft agreed on May 22: Sonam Wangchuk
content: May 22 meeting agreed that elected representatives will have supreme powers over bureaucracy; however, the draft shown to leaders ‘was not the same’, he says

title: BSF, BGB to hold Director General-level talks next week
content: First such meeting following formation of new government under Bangladesh Nationalist Party in neighbouring country and after BJP came to power in West Bengal for first time.

title: Lokesh highlights A.P. reforms, pitches Visakhapatnam to AirTrunk
content: IT Minister meets Maharashtra Chief Minister; says port city is poised to become a major AI and hyperscale data centre destination

content: the air Marshal was commissioned into the fighter stream of the Indian Air Force in 1989 . he has held several important operational, staff and diplomatic appointments . previously held the appointment of senior air Staff Officer, HQ Southern Air Command .

title: UAPA Accused Gets Bail After Nearly 5 Years In Custody
content: While granting bail, the court observed that the accused, Madhesh Shankar alias Abdullah, has been in judicial custody for more than four years and nine months.

title: Hezbollah Accepts US Proposal For Mutual Halt To Attacks With Israel: Lebanon
content: Lebanon's embassy in Washington said in a statement on Monday that Hezbollah had accepted a US proposal for a mutual cessation of hostilities that would be extended to encompass all Lebanese territory.

title: "Endangering Our Kids": Florida Sues OpenAI Over ChatGPT Safety Risks
content: Florida's attorney general on Monday sued OpenAI and its CEO Sam Altman, accusing the company's ChatGPT chatbot of endangering young users by making them addicted and encouraging harmful behaviors.

title: Amid Public Fury, Trinamool Leaders Return 'Cut Money' In Bengal Village
content: The distribution took place at a field, where the villagers were called for a special gathering. In some cases where Trinamool leaders are on the run, their families came to pay up.

title: Weather Highlights: Drastic Drop In Temperatures Keeps Delhi Cool
content: Weather Updates Today, Heatwave, IMD Alert LIVE Updates: Weather experts attributed the cooler conditions to rain and thunderstorm activity associated with an ongoing western disturbance over Rajasthan and central Pakistan.

title: 'Maharashtra Model' In Bengal? Buzz Over New Trinamool Congress Without Mamata Banerjee
content: A vast majority of Trinamool Congress MLAs were absent from a scheduled meeting at Mamata Banerjee's house

title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Iran Says Suspending US Talks, Trump Claims The Opposite
content: US-Iran war live updates: The remark by Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf came as reports suggested US President Donald Trump has sent back a revised, tougher peace proposal

title: IPL Betting Racket Busted In Guwahati During Final, 8 Arrested
content: The main accused, Alok Jain, has been running an IPL and cricket betting racket for a considerable period of time.

title: Iran Threatens "New Fronts" In War As Peace Talk Cliffhanger Continues
content: Iran's news agency Tasnim reported Tehran had suspended dialogue with mediators in protest at Israel's expanding offensive in Lebanon.

title: 80-Kg Dummy, Missing Belt: Cops Check Forensic Details In Twisha Sharma Case
content: The agency is also examining allegations that Twisha Sharma may have been assaulted before her death and whether any evidence was altered afterward.

title: Mehbooba Mufti Party Leader Arrested For Throwing Stones At Police In J&K
content: Tension flared in the area today after protesters held an unauthorised demonstration against the recent demolition of illegal structures on state land in Sidhra.

title: "Ecosystems Build Nations": Gautam Adani After Meeting 17 Startup Founders
content: "Met 17 of India's most compelling startup founders earlier today, most of them building at the frontiers of deep tech," Adani Group Chairman Gautam Adani said in a post on social media

title: Man Stuck In 120-Metre Italian Cave Saved By 53 Rescuers
content: The overnight rescue operation took place in the Grotta dei Cinghiali Volanti (Cave of the Flying Wild Boars), one of Italy's main caving areas.

title: Russia Bans Aviation Fuel Exports As Ukraine Targets Refineries
content: Kyiv has increased attacks on Russian energy facilities in recent weeks, hitting targets as far as the Urals.

title: Delhi Government Reshuffles Over 40 Staff In Health Procurement Agency
content: The Delhi government has transferred more than 40 personnel associated with the Central Procurement Agency (CPA) as part of a restructuring exercise aimed at improving efficiency and transparency in the health sector, according to an official statement.

title: Iran Suspends US Talks Over Ceasefire Violations "On All Fronts": Report
content: Iran was demanding the "immediate cessation" of Israel's military operations in Gaza and Lebanon as a precondition for resuming talks.

title: Anthropic Files For US IPO In Potential Watershed Moment For AI
content: Anthropic did not disclose the size or terms of the offering. It last raised $65 billion at a post-money valuation of $965 billion in late May.

title: Girl, 5, Dies After Falling Off Toy Train, Coming Under Its Wheels In Jodhpur
content: A family outing to the famous Mandore Garden here ended in tragedy after a five-year-old girl died after allegedly falling from a toy train ride at the tourist spot on Sunday evening.

title: Uniform Civil Code Faces Tribal Customs Challenge In Madhya Pradesh
content: Speaking in Bhopal, the Chief Minister said the state government is committed to introducing a Uniform Civil Code and has launched a dedicated website through which citizens can submit their suggestions.

title: Israel Orders Strikes On Beirut As UN Council Gears Up For Emergency Meet
content: Israel's Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and Defence Minister Israel Katz said they had ordered strikes on Beirut's usually densely populated southern suburbs.
